rationale: The citing paper centrally studies cross-brand advertising spillover and competitor-ad effects across media/channels, and its prior-work note says it extends existing competitor-advertising evidence; this directly aligns with the cited paper’s core contribution on causal advertising spillovers to competitors and implications for returns. Given this strong construct-level overlap (not just topical proximity) and a verified DOI match (10.1509/jmr.14.0274), the citation is plausibly substantive and should be retained for full relation judgment.
